name: recipe-viz
description: Recipe visualization — import, optimize, and generate interactive cooking guides

commands.name: recipe-import
commands.description: Import a recipe from URL, file, or pasted text and generate structured JSON + HTML

commands.name: recipe-build
commands.description: Generate HTML from recipe JSON (one recipe or all)

commands.name: recipe-inbox
commands.description: Process all files in inbox/ — import each, move originals to inbox/processed/

commands.name: recipe-review
commands.description: Review a recipe side-by-side: original text vs structured Phase Map

skills.name: recipe-parse
skills.description: LLM prompt for decomposing recipe text into structured JSON — ingredients, operations, DAG edges, timings, equipment, sub-products. Handles any language. Extracts raw quantities for separate unit conversion.

skills.name: recipe-optimize
skills.description: Guidance for computing relaxed and optimized phase maps from the operation DAG using lib/recipe-optimize.js

skills.name: recipe-generate
skills.description: Guidance for generating self-contained HTML recipe pages from JSON using lib/recipe-build.js
